steps.command: Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='System'; ID=1001} -MaxEvents 10 | Select TimeCreated, Message | Format-Table -Wrap

body.tr: MEMORY_MANAGEMENT/PAGE_FAULT → MemTest86. CRITICAL_PROCESS_DIED → SFC + DISM. DRIVER_IRQL → Driver update. NTFS_FILE_SYSTEM → chkdsk. UNEXPECTED_KERNEL_MODE_TRAP → donanım/ısı.
body.en: MEMORY_MANAGEMENT/PAGE_FAULT → MemTest86. CRITICAL_PROCESS_DIED → SFC + DISM. DRIVER_IRQL → driver update. NTFS_FILE_SYSTEM → chkdsk. UNEXPECTED_KERNEL_MODE_TRAP → hardware/thermal.
